title: YouTube Episode Script
description: Teleprompter script for Thai with Nine YouTube episodes (v2). Each block is a timed segment with mode, language layers, and visual cues. English narration is a first-class element — every section must be introduced with spoken English that Nine reads aloud. This is the single source of truth that drives recording, subtitle generation, and video editing.

lessonRef.description: Optional link to course lesson this episode maps to

desiredOutcome.description: One sentence in Nine's felt-promise voice: what can the viewer DO in Thai by the end of this episode that they could not do before. Used as Backward Design grounding for hook quality scoring in the variant rubric.

vocab.description: All vocabulary items featured in this episode

blocks.description: Ordered sequence of script blocks. Each block is one on-screen moment.

imagePrompts.description: AI image generation prompts for this episode's visuals

id.description: Local vocab ID within this episode, e.g. v-001

explanation.description: English explanation Nine reads aloud — usage notes, grammar position, cultural context, common mistakes. This is the teaching content, not just a translation. Target 2-4 sentences.

exampleSentences.description: Example sentences using this vocab item, with English explanation

note.description: Optional English explanation Nine reads aloud about this specific example

imageRef.description: References an imagePrompt id for the vocab card visual

mode.description: Screen mode — determines layout, text display rules, and subtitle timing. 'section-intro' is English narration Nine reads aloud to introduce a section. 'vocab-explain' is per-word English teaching (usage, grammar, cultural notes). 'explain' is general English narration.

speakerNote.description: Teleprompter direction for Nine (not shown on screen). e.g. 'Say this slowly, pause 2s before the English'

transition.description: Optional English line Nine says after this block to bridge to the next section. e.g. 'OK, now let's hear all of those together.' Spoken by Nine, not shown on screen.

imageRef.description: Which imagePrompt to show as background during this block

vocabRefs.description: Vocab items to show as cards during this block

id.description: Line ID, e.g. l-0001. Used to match Whisper timestamps.

speaker.description: Optional speaker attribution. Used in PART 1 cold-open sketches where Nine plays two characters (A and B) plus an optional narrator beat. Most blocks omit this field.

display.description: When this line appears relative to the audio. 'delayed-1s' means 1 second after Nine starts speaking this block. 'on-reveal' means it appears when the next line starts.

highlight.description: Whether to use karaoke-style word highlighting (shadowing mode)

spoken.description: Whether Nine actually speaks this line (false = on-screen only)

anchor.description: Optional English phrase Nine speaks as a timing anchor (e.g. 'sentence three'). Matched with high priority against Whisper output for reliable timestamp alignment.

displayStart.description: Start time in seconds for when this line appears on screen. Set by timestamp_audio.py or add_mock_timestamps.py.

displayEnd.description: End time in seconds for when this line disappears. Set by timestamp_audio.py or add_mock_timestamps.py.

subject.description: What the image depicts, for alt-text and matching

hookText.description: Text overlay for the first frame of the short-form clip
